notes: v2.4.11 — RP Queue rebuild (3D printing): kanban + scheduler + per-instance lifecycle, drag-merge regrouping, material/cost reconciliation. Operations Planner: scoped view for shop floor, board-access templates, mark-complete milestones cascading through Gantt / calendar / dashboard / OI. Quality: NCR Risk lifecycle (Identify -> Assess -> Monitor -> Mitigated/Escalated, AS9100 compliant), CAPA decoupled from NCR closure. Security: multi-control policy mappings + POA inline milestone dropdowns. New: Projects KPI dashboard at index, Workspace nav tab, AS9100 IMS SharePoint integration, Careers multi-site posting. File uploads now reliable across drive volumes. Department hour rollups self-healing with 6-hour SMS-alert canary. Plus 42 schema migrations.
